title: Sofia's Happy Numbers
synopsis: Join Sofia as she discovers numbers 1 through 5 while exploring different emotions and objects around her world. A gentle introduction to counting and feelings for very young children.

pages.text: This is Sofia. Sofia likes to count!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes sits smiling in a colorful room with the large number 1 prominently displayed on the wall behind her
illustration.alt: Sofia sitting happily with number 1 in background

pages.text: One flower makes Sofia happy! She smells it and smiles.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes holding one bright yellow sunflower, with a big number 1 floating above in colorful letters
illustration.alt: Sofia holding one flower with number 1 above

pages.text: Two butterflies! Sofia feels excited watching them dance.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes pointing up at two colorful butterflies with a large number 2 in bright blue patterns nearby
illustration.alt: Sofia watching two butterflies with number 2 displayed

pages.text: Three balloons float by! Sofia feels surprised and reaches up.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes reaching toward three red balloons with a decorative number 3 in rainbow stripes
illustration.alt: Sofia reaching for three balloons with number 3 shown

pages.text: Four birds sing! Sofia feels calm listening to their sweet song.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes sitting peacefully under a tree with four small blue birds and a large number 4 with musical note patterns
illustration.alt: Sofia listening to four birds with decorative number 4

pages.text: Five stars shine! Sofia feels sleepy and yawns big.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes yawning in pajamas with five golden stars above her and a glittery number 5 nearby
illustration.alt: Sleepy Sofia with five stars and number 5 displayed

pages.text: Counting makes Sofia feel wonderful! One, two, three, four, five!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes clapping happily surrounded by all five numbers 1-5 in different bright colors and patterns arranged in a circle
illustration.alt: Happy Sofia surrounded by numbers 1 through 5

metadata.illustrationStyle: clear countable objects, fun patterns, numbers prominent, visual counting, each number unique scene, engaging practice, organized arrangement, mathematical beauty

questions.question: How many flowers did Sofia hold?
questions.explanation: Sofia held one flower and it made her happy!

questions.question: How many butterflies did Sofia see?
questions.explanation: Sofia saw two butterflies dancing and felt excited!

questions.question: How did Sofia feel when she saw the stars?
questions.explanation: The five stars made Sofia feel sleepy and she yawned!
